summary: Litper Connect Hub v1.4 backend testing: 19/19 tests passed covering (A) multi-LLM router (5 providers list, groq/mistral/gemini pings, agent /run with groq override + auto routing) and (B) robust webhooks — Chatea delivered event + inbound 'ya_recogio' auto-classify + 'NO' opt-out, Twilio completed (call_sid+duration attached) + no-answer (result=no_contesta,status=done), ElevenLabs confirmed→confirmado + wrong_number→numero_incorrecto with queue advancement, /webhooks/events log, signature verification correctly disabled when secret blank, plus regressions (health, voices=6, novedades=18, /metrics schema).

minor.issue: Attempt Pydantic model in /app/backend/models.py is missing fields call_sid, duration_seconds, recording_url, transcript, summary. Twilio + ElevenLabs webhooks correctly persist these fields into Mongo (verified via direct DB query) but they are STRIPPED from the HTTP response by response_model=CallSchedule. Data is safe; only the read API projection loses info.

action_items: Extend models.Attempt with optional call_sid, duration_seconds, recording_url, transcript, summary fields so GET /api/calls/schedule/{queue_id} exposes the data written by Twilio/ElevenLabs webhooks. (One-line fix in models.py; no schema migration needed.)
critical_code_review_comments: Router fallback chain works as designed: Groq → Gemini → Mistral → Cerebras; provider override propagates correctly from /agent/run.
Signature verification correctly no-ops when *_WEBHOOK_SECRET is blank (safe default for dev).

webhooks.py auto-classify logic correctly handles ya_recogi/recogí/pasé/listo variants and opt-out keywords (NO/STOP/BAJA/SALIR) with proper cascade to orders.opt_out + call_queue.status=detenido + pending attempts→skipped.
ElevenLabs webhook delegates to routes.cadence.attempt_result via direct function import — tight coupling but works; consider extracting business logic to a service module for testability.
Attempt model omissions cause silent data loss on API projection (see minor issue above).
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_ orders during tests (TEST_WH_v14, TEST_WH_OPTOUT, 2x TEST_WH_11L). Auto-enqueued in call_queue with schedules. No cleanup performed — these are isolated with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_hub_v14.py covers v1.4 (router+webhooks). Prior files test_hub.py (v1.0, 25) and test_hub_v13.py (v1.3, 24) still valid. Twilio-completed test verifies call_sid/duration via direct Mongo read because Attempt Pydantic model strips those fields on API response — main agent should add call_sid/duration_seconds/recording_url/transcript/summary as Optional fields on Attempt.
